title: update gvproxy version to 0.8.4
body:
The 0.8.4 has one important fix[1], which could improve #25121.
Also it set all places to use same version of gvisor-tap-vsock 

[1]https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/issues/474

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:

```release-note
Update the bundled gvproxy version to 0.8.4
```

@baude PTAL, did you mention you want to include this in v5.4.1? So should we backport this?
cc @mheon

> Should renovate be watching this?

It is for go.mod but not for the others versions strings, we really should just deduplicate the version https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/issues/475

@mheon: once the present PR merges, I will cherry-pick it on top of `v5.4` in a new PR and assign it to you.
